testcase.name: contextLoads

19:05:41.145 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.marketplace.AplicacaoMercadoTest]: AplicacaoMercadoTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 19:05:41.321 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.marketplace.AplicacaoMercado for test class com.example.marketplace.AplicacaoMercadoTest
